title: gaultheria lanigera
intro: Gaultheria lanigera, also known as the Woolly Peppermint or Mountain Pepper, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gaultheria lanigera include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Gaultheria lanigera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
